evidence_summary: Establish the overwhelming scale and monochromatic green splendor of the Emerald City to transition characters from travelers to awe-struck visitors. The visual language must emphasize the contrast between the weary, multi-colored group and the uniform emer...

Dorothy, Toto, Scarecrow, Tin Woodman, and Cowardly Lion arrive at the gates of the Emerald City. They are overwhelmed by the green marble streets and emerald-studded architecture before being led toward the Palace of Oz.
The group stands at the threshold of the gates, looking upward in curiosity.
The group is walking through a crowd toward the distant Palace of Oz, visibly overwhelmed.
The group navigates the emerald streets while reacting to the overwhelming green environment.
